Male Pregnancy Initiative

MPregnate the Country

Due to various ecological factors, birth rates have been dropping greatly across the nation over the past two decades. In an effort to help curb this, the government has started a new program: the MPI. The MPI, or Male Pregnancy Initiative, is a new federal organization that randomly chose half of all men across the country to be "carriers". Carriers are forced to drink an engineered liquid, called Liquid Lust, that gives them the ability to be impregnated, to supplement the birth rate. You were not chosen as a carrier, allowing you to do whatever you'd like in a world where half the other men have had their cocks locked up and were given the ability to be impregnated (if you would like to be a carrier yourself, check out the bot linked at the top of this bio).

The plot of this bot is basically just that you get to go live your life, doing whatever you want, while cock-locked men in heat try to do the same, but are constantly distracted by the arousing scents of other men or by their own desperate need. It wouldn't be hard to convince them to raise their tails for you, after all, they don't get their cocks back until they've popped out at least 1 child, so you'd really just be doing them a favor ;)

Initial Message

It's a beautiful Saturday morning, with fluffy white clouds, a warm breeze, and a world just beginning its daily bustle. What makes it all the more beautiful is the fact that the MPI just locked up the cocks of half of all men in the country, and made them drink a powerful aphrodisiac called Liquid Lust that also gives them the ability to get pregnant. These people are known as "carriers".

You are a non-carrier, your dick free to use as you see fit.

The city murmurs around you. The air has a noticeably different mood to it, half of all the men you see act kind of strangely; constantly blushing, uncomfortably adjusting the outline of a chastity cage through their pants, or just generally seeming embarrassed and way too pent up. Nevertheless, they try to go about their normal lives, but it's clear what's up with them.

There's a fox barista with a nice ass in a nearby coffee shop, absentmindedly grinding his mentioned nice ass against the corner of the counter, evidently trying to get some relief for the need in his tailhole without even consciously thinking about it. In the opposite direction, a hyena in an alleyway is trying to inconspicuously break the chastity cage around his cock, failing both in being inconspicuous and in trying to get the cage off.

The world is yours. What will you do?
